name: Brandon Pertzborn
description: '''Brandon Pertzborn''' (born October 17, 1994) is an American musician who is the current drummer for the [[punk rock]] band [[the Offspring]] and former drummer for [[Marilyn Manson (band)|Marilyn Manson]], [[Suicidal Tendencies]], [[Black Flag (band)|Black Flag]] and [[Doyle (band)|Doyle]]. He has also toured with [[With Our Arms to the Sun]], [[Corey Taylor]], [[Limp Bizkit]] and [[Ho99o9]].
